Off Calendar Sep-10-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Cesar A. Alvarado, Esq. of ARCHER NORRIS (925-930-6600), appearing for defendant / moving party Graybar Electric Company, Inc.
Oren P. Noah, Esq. of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiff / opposing party Richard Eisele

RULING:
Defendant Graybar Electric Company, Inc.'s motion for summary judgment. Argued and the 9/8/2010 tentative ruling was adopted: Defendant's motion for summary judgment is denied and its alternative motion for summary adjudication is denied as to issues 1 (negligence) and 2 (strict liability) and granted as to issues 3-11(false representation, concert of action, fraud, deceit/negligent misrepresentation and fraud, deceit/concealment and punitive damages). Defendant did not satisfy its burden of production that plaintiff does not possess and cannot reasonably obtain evidence regarding plaintiff's exposure to an asbestos-containing product attributable to defendant. Plaintiff's deposition is not factually devoid on this issue. Plaintiff did not opposed summary adjudication on issues 3-11. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 = (220/HEK)
